mapped.Unwrap())\n\t\t}\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc TestMapErr(t *testing.T) {\n\tt.Run(\"map err ok result returns unchanged\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tresult := OkParse(50)\n\t\tmapped := result.MapErr(func(e *EnhancedParseError) *EnhancedParseError {\n\t\t\treturn NewSyntaxParseError(\"other.yaml\", \"transformed\", 1, 1, \"\", \"\")\n\t\t})\n\n\t\tif !mapped.IsOk() {\n\t\t\tt.Error(\"expected mapped result to be ok\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif mapped.Unwrap() != 50 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"expected 50, got %d\", mapped.Unwrap())\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(\"map err error result transforms error\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\terr := NewEmptyParseError(\"test.yaml\")\n\t\tresult := ErrParse[int](err)\n\t\tmapped := result.MapErr(func(e *EnhancedParseError) *EnhancedParseError mappedErr.FilePath)\n\t\t}\n\t})\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// AndThen Tests\n// ============================================================================\n\nfunc TestAndThen(t *testing.T) {\n\tt.Run(\"and then with ok results\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tresult := ok\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif chained.Unwrap() != 30 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"expected 30, got %d\", chained.Unwrap())\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(\"and then with error result\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\terr := NewEmptyParseError(\"test.yaml\")\n\t\tresult := ErrParse[int](err)\n\t\tcalled := false\n\n\t\tchained := result.AndThen(func(x int) ParseResultWithError[int] {\n\t\t\tcalled = true\n\t\t\treturn OkParse(x * 3)\n\t\t})\n\n\t\tif called {\n\t\t\tt.Error(\"expected function not to be called on error result\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif !chained.IsError() {\n\t\t\tt.Error(\"expected chained result to be error\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif chained.Error() != err {\n\t\t\tt.Error(\"expected same error to be returned\")\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(\"and then with error in function\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tresult {\n\t\t\tt.Error(\"expected chained result to be error\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif chained.Error().FilePath != \"error.yaml\" {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"expected error from function, got FilePath=%s\", chained.Error().FilePath)\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(\"and then chains multiple operations\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tresult := OkParse(2)\n\t\tchained := result.AndThen(func(x int) ParseResultWithError[int] {\n\t\t\treturn OkParse(x + 3)\n\t\t}).AndThen(func(x int) ParseResultWithError[int] {\n\t\t\treturn OkParse(x * 4)\n\t\t}).AndThen(func(x int) ParseResultWithError[int] {\n\t\t\treturn OkParse(x - 1)\n\t\t})\n\n\t\tif chained.IsError() {\n\t\t\tt.Error(\"expected chained result to be ok\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// (2 + 3) * 4 - 1 = 19\n\t\tif chained.Unwrap() != 19 exists (simulated)\n224\t\t\tif path == \"nonexistent.yaml\" {\n225\t\t\t\treturn Err[map[string]interface{}, *EnhancedParseError](\n226\t\t\t\t\tNewIOParseError(path, \"file not found\", 0, := map[string]interface{}{\n239\t\t\t\t\"name\": \"test\",\n240\t\t\t\t\"port\": 8080,\n241\t\t\t}\n242\t\t\treturn Ok[map[string]interface{}, *EnhancedParseError](config)\n243\t\t}\n244\t\n245\t\t// Test cases\n246\t\tcases := []string{\"config.yaml\", \"nonexistent.yaml\", \"invalid.yaml\"}\n247\t\n248\t\tfor _, path := range cases {\n249\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"\\nParsing %s:\\n\", path)\n250\t\t\tresult := parseConfig(path)\n251\t\n252\t\t\tif result.IsOk() {\n253\t\t\t\tconfig := result.Unwrap()\n254\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"  Success: %+v\\n\", config)\n255\t\t\t} else {\n256\t\t\t\terr := result.UnwrapErr()\n257\t\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"  Error: %s\\n\", err.Error())\n258\t\t\t}\n259\t\t}\n260\t\n261\t\t// Output:\n262\t\t// Parsing config.yaml:\n263\t\t//   Success: map[name:test port:8080]\n264\t\t//\n265\t\t// Parsing nonexistent.yaml:\n266\t\t//   Error: io error in nonexistent.yaml: file not found\n267\t\t//\n268\t\t// Parsing invalid.yaml:\n269\t\t//   Error: syntax error in invalid.yaml at line 5, column 10: invalid YAML syntax (expected: valid YAML, found: invalid)\n270\t}\n271\t\n272\t// Example 10: Error Transformation from yaml.v3 Errors\n273\t//\n274\t// This example demonstrates transforming yaml.v3 parser errors into EnhancedParseError.\n275\tfunc ExampleEnhancedParseError_transformFromYAML() {\n276\t\t// Simulate a yaml.v3 error\n277\t\ttype yamlError struct {\n278\t\t\tline   int\n279\t\t\tcolumn int\n280\t\t\tmsg    string\n281\t\t}\n282\t\n283\t\tyamlErr := &yamlError{\n284\t\t\tline:   7,\n285\t\t\tcolumn: 12,\n286\t\t\tmsg:    \"yaml: line 7: found character that cannot start any token\",\n287\t\t}\n288\t\n289\t\t// Transform into EnhancedParseError\n290\t\terr := NewSyntaxParseError(\n291\t\t\t\"data.yaml\",\n292\t\t\t\"invalid token\",\n293\t\t\tyamlErr.line,\n294\t\t\tyamlErr.column,\n295\t\t\t\"valid YAML token\",\n296\t\t\t\"invalid character\",\n297\t\t)\n298\t\n299\t\t// Add context snippet (would normally read from file)\n300\t\terr.LocationInfo.Snippet = \"  host: localhost:port:invalid\"\n301\t\terr.LocationInfo.SurroundingLines = []string{\n302\t\t\t\"database:\",\n303\t\t\t\"  host: localhost\",\n304\t\t\t\"  port: 5432\",\n305\t\t\t\"  host: localhost:port:invalid\",\n306\t\t}\n307\t\terr.LocationInfo.SnippetLineIndex = 3\n308\t\n309\t\tfmt.Println(err.String())\n310\t\n311\t\t// Output:\n312\t\t// syntax error in data.yaml at line 7, column 12: invalid token (expected: valid YAML token, found: invalid character)\n313\t\t//\n314\t\t//   database:\n315\t\t//     host: localhost\n316\t\t//     port: 5432\n317\t\t// >   host: localhost:port:invalid\n318\t}\n319\t\n320\t// Example 11: Error with Rich Context\n321\t//\n322\t// This example demonstrates an error with full context including surrounding lines.\n323\tfunc ExampleEnhancedParseError_richContext() {\n324\t\terr := NewSyntaxParseError(\n325\t\t\t\"app.yaml\",\n326\t\t\t\"incorrect indentation\",\n327\t\t\t8,\n328\t\t\t5,\n329\t\t\t\"consistent 5432\n351\t\t//     ^--- here\n352\t\t//\n353\t\t//   database:\n354\t\t//     host: localhost\n355\t\t// >   port: 5432\n356\t\t//     name: mydb\n357\t}\n358\t\n359\t// Example 12: Schema Schema path: /path/to/schema.yaml\n378\t\t// Schema name: DatabaseConfig\n379\t}\n380\t\n381\t// Example 13: Error Code for Programmatic Handling\n382\t//\n383\t// This example demonstrates using error codes for programmatic error handling.\n384\tfunc ExampleEnhancedParseError_errorCode() {\n385\t\terr := NewSyntaxParseError(\"config.yaml\", \"syntax error\", 5, 10, \"\", \"\")\n386\t\n387\t\tcode := err.Code()\n388\t\tfmt.Println(\"Error code:\", code)\n389\t\n390\t\t// Programmatic handling based on error code\n391\t\tswitch code {\n392\t\tcase ErrCodeInvalidSyntax:\n393\t\t\tfmt.Println(\"Action: Check YAML syntax and indentation\")\n394\t\tcase ErrCodeTypeMismatch:\n395\t\t\tfmt.Println(\"Action: Verify field types\")\n396\t\tcase ErrCodeDuplicateKey:\n397\t\t\tfmt.Println(\"Action: Remove duplicate keys\")\n398\t\tdefault:\n399\t\t\tfmt.Println(\"Action: Check error details\")\n400\t\t}\n401\t\n402\t\t// Output:\n403\t\t// Error code: INVALID_SYNTAX\n404\t\t// Action: Check YAML syntax and indentation\n405\t}\n406\t\n407\t// Example 14: Converting to Legacy Error Types\n408\t//\n409\t// This example demonstrates backward compatibility with legacy error types.\n410\tfunc ExampleEnhancedParseError_toLegacy() {\n411\t\tsyntaxErr := NewSyntaxParseError(\"config.yaml\", \"syntax error\", 5, 10, \"key\", \"value\")\n412\t\tlegacySyntax := syntaxErr.ToLegacySyntaxError()\n413\t\tif legacySyntax != nil {\n414\t\t\tfmt.Println(\"Legacy SyntaxError:\", legacySyntax.Error())\n415\t\t}\n416\t\n417\t\tstructureErr := NewStructureParseError(\"data.yaml\", \"duplicate key\", 10, \"id\", \"items.0\")\n418\t\tlegacyStructure := structureErr.ToLegacyStructureError()\n419\t\tif legacyStructure != nil {\n420\t\t\tfmt.Println(\"Legacy StructureError:\", legacyStructure.Error())\n421\t\t}\n422\t\n423\t\ttypeErr := NewTypeMismatchParseError(\"config.yaml\", \"type error\", 8, \"field\", \"int\", \"string\", \"value\")\n424\t\tlegacyType := typeErr.ToLegacyTypeMismatchError()\n425\t\tif legacyType != nil {\n426\t\t\tfmt.Println(\"Legacy TypeMismatchError:\", legacyType.Error())\n427\t\t}\n428\t\n429\t\t// Output:\n430\t\t// Legacy SyntaxError: syntax error in config.yaml at line 5, column 10: syntax
